recommendations.title: Customer master data
recommendations.description: Create the Customer master data model to store profiles, contact info, and visit history references.
recommendations.reason: Customer management and visit history are core capabilities for booking and upsell.

recommendations.title: Stylist/Barber master data
recommendations.description: Model staff profiles, roles, schedules, and commission settings.
recommendations.reason: Staff availability and commission visibility depend on consistent staff master data.

recommendations.title: Service master data
recommendations.description: Define service catalog with duration, price, and upsell metadata.
recommendations.reason: Booking and upsell suggestions require a standardized service catalog.

recommendations.title: Product master data
recommendations.description: Define retail products with SKU, price, and stock tracking attributes.
recommendations.reason: Inventory tracking and retail sales require consistent product definitions.

recommendations.title: Appointment master data
recommendations.description: Model appointment lifecycle, assigned staff, services, and timing.
recommendations.reason: Fast booking and lifecycle workflows depend on appointment master data.

recommendations.title: Sale master data
recommendations.description: Capture sales transactions linking services, products, staff, and totals for commissions.
recommendations.reason: Sales and commissions require a core transaction entity.

recommendations.title: Use case entities for booking, sales, inventory, and commissions
recommendations.description: Plan use case entities for create/reschedule/cancel/complete appointments, record sales, adjust inventory, and calculate commissions.
recommendations.reason: Scope includes lifecycle workflows and metric updates that require write-oriented use cases.

recommendations.title: Appointment booking workflow
recommendations.description: Workflow to create/reschedule/cancel appointments with availability checks and conflict validation.
recommendations.reason: Fast booking is a core requirement and depends on a structured workflow.

recommendations.title: Check-in and checkout workflow
recommendations.description: Workflow to complete appointments, add retail items, and record sales to drive revenue and commissions.
recommendations.reason: Captures sales transactions and updates downstream metrics.

recommendations.title: Inventory adjustment workflow
recommendations.description: Workflow to decrement stock on sales and allow manual adjustments.
recommendations.reason: Inventory accuracy depends on structured adjustments and sales linkages.

recommendations.title: Commission calculation workflow
recommendations.description: Workflow to compute commissions per sale or period based on configured rules.
recommendations.reason: Commission reporting is a core capability and requires a dedicated workflow.

recommendations.title: Dashboard page
recommendations.description: Operational dashboard showing today’s bookings, staff utilization, and daily revenue.
recommendations.reason: Explicitly required key screen for daily operations.

recommendations.title: Customer list page
recommendations.description: Customer management with visit history and quick actions for booking.
recommendations.reason: Core screen for managing customers and visits.

recommendations.title: Appointment booking page
recommendations.description: Fast booking UI with stylist availability and service selection.
recommendations.reason: Core screen for booking appointments quickly.

recommendations.title: Staff performance & commissions page
recommendations.description: Performance dashboard for staff with commission summaries.
recommendations.reason: Required for staff management and commission visibility.

recommendations.title: Inventory page
recommendations.description: Retail inventory list with stock levels and adjustment actions.
recommendations.reason: Inventory management is a core requirement.

recommendations.title: Service catalog page
recommendations.description: Manage services with duration, price, and upsell flags.
recommendations.reason: Service catalog must be maintained for booking and upsell.

recommendations.title: Staff schedule page
recommendations.description: Manage staff availability and schedules used for booking.
recommendations.reason: Availability management is required for accurate booking.

recommendations.title: Checkout / Sales page
recommendations.description: Capture completed services, retail items, and sales totals at checkout.
recommendations.reason: Sales capture drives revenue metrics and commissions.

recommendations.title: Metrics admin dashboard
recommendations.description: Admin dashboard to view and validate initial KPIs and trends.
recommendations.reason: Initial metrics dashboard was explicitly accepted.

recommendations.title: Operations metrics table
recommendations.description: Metric table for today’s bookings, daily revenue, and staff utilization.
recommendations.reason: Required to power the basic metrics dashboard.

recommendations.title: Performance metrics table
recommendations.description: Metric table for commission totals and staff performance summaries.
recommendations.reason: Supports staff performance screen and commission visibility.

recommendations.title: Role-based access control
recommendations.description: RBAC module for Owner, Manager, Barber/Stylist, and Receptionist roles.
recommendations.reason: Role-based access is required to secure operational screens.

recommendations.title: Notifications
recommendations.description: Notifications for booking confirmations and schedule changes.
recommendations.reason: Operational communications improve booking reliability.

recommendations.title: Recommendation agent
recommendations.description: LLM agent for upsell suggestions and walk-in time slot guidance using visit history and availability.
recommendations.reason: LLM feature is requested but can follow core booking flows.

recommendations.title: LLM upsell suggestions plugin
recommendations.description: Plugin to generate upsell service recommendations for a customer.
recommendations.reason: Supports the upsell feature once data sources are confirmed.

recommendations.title: LLM walk-in slots plugin
recommendations.description: Plugin to suggest best walk-in time slots using availability and utilization signals.
recommendations.reason: Supports walk-in slot recommendations after core scheduling is live.

questions: Confirm the commission rule type (fixed %, tiered, or per-stylist custom) to finalize commission workflow logic.
Should upsell recommendations use only visit history or also current inventory and service availability?
trace: Built recommendations from the discovered scope for bookings, sales, inventory, commissions, and dashboards.
Included MDM for all core entities and metric tables because the initial metrics dashboard was accepted.
Added use case entities due to write-heavy workflows and metric updates.
